name: Bean Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 bag frozen bell pepper strips (or chunkies)
2 cans small red beans (15 oz each)
1/4 teaspoon cayenne (less if you're not into fire...)
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the bag of onion chunkies and place them in a non-stick pot.
2. Heat until translucent, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Add the frozen bell pepper strips and heat until they begin to thaw.
4. Drain and rinse the beans, then add them to the pot along with about one cup of water.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and reduce the heat to maintain a simmer.
6. Continue cooking until hot, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
7. Once heated through, stir in the cumin, ground chipotle peppers (if using), and cayenne pepper.
8. Taste and adjust seasonings as desired.
9. Serve over brown rice.
Voila! No chopping required, only one pot to wash (or two if you count the rice pot). This dish serves three people and provides leftovers for lunch the next day.
